SIG_DIR
SIG_EDIR
SIG_FILE

ZipReader(String)
Extract files from a zip uncompressed archive

getFile(String)
Return a DataInput given a file path name in the archive will return a null if this file is not present in the archive
list()
List files in the archive

SIG_FILE 
  public final static int SIG_FILE
SIG_DIR

ZipReader 
  public ZipReader(String path) throws IOException
Extract files from a zip uncompressed archive

list 
  public Enumeration list()
List files in the archive
getFile 
  public DataInput getFile(String pathname) throws IOException
Return a DataInput given a file path name in the archive will return a null if this file is not present in the archive
